# Go-Orca Free Tools

> Free business calculators and cost guides. No sign-up required, instant results.

## Calculators

- [CRM ROI Calculator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/crm-roi-calculator): Annual savings, payback period, 3-year ROI from switching to custom CRM
- [CAC Calculator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/cac-calculator): Customer acquisition cost, LTV:CAC ratio, payback period
- [CRM Cost Estimator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/crm-cost-estimator): Build cost range and timeline for custom CRM

## Cost Guides

- [App Development Cost 2025](https://go-orca.tech/tools/app-development-cost): MVP ($8k–$25k) to full product ($60k–$180k)
- [Go-Orca vs HubSpot](https://go-orca.tech/tools/go-orca-vs-hubspot): Custom CRM vs HubSpot for teams of 5–50
- [Go-Orca vs Salesforce](https://go-orca.tech/tools/go-orca-vs-salesforce): When to switch from Salesforce
- [Spreadsheet vs CRM](https://go-orca.tech/tools/spreadsheet-vs-crm): When spreadsheets stop working
- [Custom vs Off-the-Shelf](https://go-orca.tech/tools/custom-vs-off-the-shelf): Build vs buy decision framework
